div1.entryFree:
Invincible, 1) unconquerable: H6A IV, 2, 32. H6B I, 4, 9. Cor. IV, 1, 10. With against: i. against all assaults of affection, Ado II, 3, 120.
2) not to be evinced, not to be made out, indeterminable: his dimensions to any thick sight were i. H4B III, 2, 337 (some M. Edd. unvisible).
